info.title: IM Admin API
info.description: Authority snapshot for the IM admin backend served behind /api/admin/*.

servers.description: Unified IM admin gateway proxy root

tags.name: auth
tags.description: Operator console session bootstrap and current-session introspection.

tags.name: marketing
tags.description: Campaign configuration and campaign state changes.

tags.name: access
tags.description: API key issuance and key-group governance.

tags.name: routing
tags.description: Routing profile, snapshot, decision-log, and provider-health reads.

tags.name: catalog
tags.description: Channel, provider, credential, model, and pricing catalog administration.

tags.name: billing
tags.description: Billing event and billing summary reads.

tags.name: operations
tags.description: Rate-limit governance and runtime operation controls.

tags.name: storage
tags.description: Storage policy, credential validation, and audit administration.
